title: PlusCode
description: An encoded location reference, derived from latitude and longitude coordinates, that represents an area. Plus codes can be used as a replacement for street addresses in places where they do not exist.

global_code.description: The global (full) plus code consisting of area code and local code (e.g., 849VCWC8+R9).

compound_code.description: The compound plus code consisting of the local code and a locality description (e.g., CWC8+R9 Mountain View, CA, USA).
